# Heading One

A paragraph with **bold**, _italic_, `code`, and a [link](https://example.com).
It also has inline JSX like <Highlight color="yellow">marked</Highlight> text.

<Callout type="warning">
  This is block JSX with prose children that stays opaque in v1.
</Callout>

  sources={{

/>

{/* a top-level expression comment, kept verbatim */}

Some prose between constructs.

- list item one
- list item two with `inline code`

> A blockquote line.
> Continuing the quote.

```js
const x = 1; // not translated
```

<>
  Fragment children, also opaque.
</>

Final paragraph after a self-closing tag <br /> mid-text.
